name: Internal Tool
description: An internal request tracker ("Ops Desk") where staff submit operational requests and see the open queue — a submit form plus a live list, all in a no-nonsense brutalist shell.
prompt: Build an internal request tracker called <name>: a top nav, a short functional hero, a submit form with title, requester, and priority that POSTs to the requests collection, a live table of open requests fetched from it that refreshes after each submit, and a footer.
